title: Pan-Seared Sea Bass with Miso Glaze
description: A classic Japanese-inspired dish featuring flaky sea bass seared to perfection and topped with a sweet miso glaze.

ingredients.name: miso paste
ingredients.notes: White or yellow miso works well

instructions: Heat a skillet or oven-safe pan over medium-high heat.
Season the sea bass with salt and pepper.
Add 1 tsp of sesame oil to the pan and sear the sea bass for 2-3 minutes per side.
Transfer the pan to the oven and bake at 400°F (200°C) for 8-10 minutes or until cooked through.
While the fish is cooking, whisk together the miso paste, brown sugar, soy sauce, and rice vinegar in a small bowl.
Brush the miso glaze over the cooked sea bass during the last 2 minutes of cooking.
Remove the fish from the oven and garnish with green onions and toasted sesame seeds (if using).
